SEARCH
Package com.app.cashier

Class Main

Application
com.app.cashier.Main
public class Main extends Application
Entry point for the Cashier JavaFX application. Loads the main view and launches the application window.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    Main method that launches the JavaFX application.
    void
    start(Stage stage)
    Starts the JavaFX application by loading the main FXML view and displaying it in a new stage.

    • Main

      public Main()

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start(Stage stage) throws Exception
      Starts the JavaFX application by loading the main FXML view and displaying it in a new stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary stage for this application
      Throws:
      Exception - if the FXML file cannot be loaded

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method that launches the JavaFX application.
      Parameters:
      args - command-line arguments
